query:
SELECT CONCAT(w.code, ' | ', w.full_name, ' | group:', COALESCE(CAST(w.group_id AS CHAR), 'NULL')) as worker_info FROM workers w WHERE w.id = 180104;
SELECT CONCAT(g.id, ' | ', g.code, ' | ', g.name, ' | wage:', COALESCE(CAST(g.daily_wage AS CHAR), 'NULL'), ' | mins:', COALESCE(CAST(g.work_minutes AS CHAR), 'NULL')) as group_info FROM `groups` g;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT CONCAT(w.code, ' | ', w.full_name, ' | group:', COALESCE(CAST(w.group_id AS CHAR), 'NULL')) as worker_info FROM workers w WHERE w.id = 180104;
SELECT CONCAT(g.id, ' | ', g.code, ' | ', g.name, ' | wage:', COALESCE(CAST(g.daily_wage AS CHAR), 'NULL'), ' | mins:', COALESCE(CAST(g.work_minutes AS CHAR), 'NULL')) as group_info FROM `groups` g;
